Name: Singapore American School
Tagline: Singapore American School, a private pre-k to grade 12 school in Singapore, focuses on growth, development, and cultural awareness. Discover SAS!
About: At Singapore American School, we are committed to providing a culture of exceptional care which sets high standards and utilizes best practices in prevention and response to harm. When children are being impacted by harm inside or outside of school, we work from international guidance on the rights of children, local legislation on child welfare, and best safeguarding practices globally to inform our policies and procedures.
Philosophy: Child safeguarding is a big umbrella. It refers to the actions we take on behalf of children and community members to promote wellbeing, protect human rights, promote healthy development, and reduce or mitigate the risk of harm to children.
Outcomes: Singapore American School prepares students for global citizenship and academic excellence, with a strong emphasis on cultural awareness and personal growth.
Admissions: Important Note: To ensure the highest quality of support, space in our specialized programs is managed separately from general grade-level capacity. Enrollment in these programs is especially limited and may not be reflected in the status icons above.
Quote: Get to know SAS for our young learners!

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Teachers at Singapore American School hold advanced degrees and certifications, with many having extensive international teaching experience. They employ a student-centered approach, focusing on inquiry-based learning and critical thinking skills.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Singapore American School offers comprehensive counseling services and a dedicated pastoral care team to support student wellbeing. Regular workshops and community-building activities foster a nurturing and inclusive environment.
Performance.Academic Integration: The curriculum at Singapore American School includes Advanced Placement (AP) courses and a focus on STEAM education. Emphasis is placed on experiential learning and interdisciplinary studies to prepare students for global challenges.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates from Singapore American School often gain acceptance to prestigious universities worldwide, including Ivy League institutions. The school boasts a strong record in academic competitions and extracurricular achievements.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The campus features state-of-the-art science labs, a performing arts center, and an Olympic-sized swimming pool. Advanced technology resources, including a makerspace and digital media labs, enhance the learning experience.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Singapore American School uses a robust system of continuous assessments and regular parent-teacher conferences to monitor student progress. Detailed reports and feedback ensure transparency and foster student development.
